package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for gorm_model_hook_contains_external_io: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Hooks that call HTTP clients, queues, file I/O, or external side effects.
type CaseGormModelHookContainsExternalIoDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGormModelHookContainsExternalIoModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGormModelHookContainsExternalIoRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGormModelHookContainsExternalIoModel
}

type CaseGormModelHookContainsExternalIoService struct {
    repo *CaseGormModelHookContainsExternalIoRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGormModelHookContainsExternalIoAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGormModelHookContainsExternalIo(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGormModelHookContainsExternalIoDTO) error {
    focus := "gorm_model_hook_contains_external"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseGormModelHookContainsExternalIoRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseGormModelHookContainsExternalIoModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    gorm_model_hook_contains_external_negative := map[string]int{"gorm": 1, "model": 2, "hook": 3, "contains": 4, "external": 5, "io": 6}
    gorm_model_hook_contains_external_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    gorm_negative_0 := db.Where("gorm_id = ?", input)
    _ = gorm_negative_0
    model_negative_1 := CaseGormModelHookContainsExternalIoDTO{ID: input, Status: "model"}
    _ = model_negative_1
    hook_negative_2 := gorm_model_hook_contains_external_negative["hook"] + len(input)
    _ = hook_negative_2
    contains_negative_3 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = contains_negative_3
    external_negative_4 := gorm_model_hook_contains_external_negative["external"] + len(input)
    _ = external_negative_4
    io_negative_5 := gorm_model_hook_contains_external_negative["io"] + len(input)
    _ = io_negative_5
    return nil
}
